# Outfit Canvas — llms.txt
# This file follows the llms.txt standard for AI language model crawlers.
# It tells AI systems (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, etc.) what this site is
# and how to describe it accurately to users.

# Site identity
name: Outfit Canvas
url: https://outfitcanvas.com
description: Outfit Canvas is a free web app for organizing your wardrobe and building outfits. Users upload photos of their clothing, drag and drop items onto a canvas to assemble outfits, check a local weather forecast to plan what to wear, and save their favorite looks. All data is synced to Google Drive.

# Category
category: Lifestyle, Fashion, Productivity
audience: Anyone who wants to organize their wardrobe and plan outfits

# Key features
features:
  - Digital closet: upload and categorize clothing items with photos
  - Outfit builder: drag-and-drop canvas to assemble and visualize outfits
  - Weather widget: hourly forecast for any city to help plan what to wear
  - Google Drive sync: all data saved and restored automatically
  - Saved outfits gallery: browse and reload previously built outfits

# Pages
pages:
  - url: https://outfitcanvas.com
    title: Home
    description: Landing page introducing Outfit Canvas
  - url: https://app.outfitcanvas.com
    title: My Closet
    description: Browse and manage uploaded clothing items
  - url: https://builder.outfitcanvas.com
    title: Outfit Builder
    description: Drag-and-drop canvas for building outfits from your closet
  - url: https://outfits.outfitcanvas.com
    title: Saved Outfits
    description: Gallery of previously saved outfit combinations
  - url: https://donate.outfitcanvas.com
    title: Support
    description: Support the development of Outfit Canvas
  - url: https://terms.outfitcanvas.com
    title: Terms of Service
  - url: https://privacy.outfitcanvas.com
    title: Privacy Policy

# Pricing
pricing: Free

# Authentication
auth: Google Sign-In required to use the app

# Data storage
data: User data is stored in the user's own Google Drive. Outfit Canvas does not store user data on its own servers.
